- https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/79910 by @wAngByg
- https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/80681 by @wAngByg

- Keep changes narrow to the failing check surfaces.

- Run Codex /review and address any findings before a merge recommendation.
